name: IBM Information Integration Family — Aberdeen Group Profile (1997)
description: Structured archival data package derived from Aberdeen Group's 1997 profile of IBM's Information Integration product family, covering DataJoiner, DataPropagator, Net.data (DB2 WWW Connection), and MQSeries for heterogeneous data federation, replication, and web-to-database connectivity.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group, Inc.
creator.address: One Boston Place, Boston, Massachusetts 02108 USA

about.name: Enterprise Data Integration Middleware
about.description: IBM Information Integration product family for heterogeneous data federation and replication
